name: Cold Start (Goal-Targeted)
description: 针对特定目标，筛选文件 → 筛选函数 → 深度分析 → 关系提取。适合首次接入或有明确分析方向时使用。

rounds.name: Round 1: Scope Selection
rounds.description: LLM picks which files are relevant to the analysis goal
rounds.inputDesc: File list with functions and cross-file dependencies

variables.name: fileList
variables.description: 格式化的文件列表，含函数名和调用关系

rounds.name: Round 2: Triage
rounds.description: Per-file, identify which functions contain design decisions worth deep analysis
rounds.inputDesc: Full source code + function list with caller/callee deps + business context

variables.name: businessContext
variables.description: 业务上下文（手动录入的 spec/背景），可能为空

variables.name: functionList
variables.description: 文件中的函数列表，含行号和调用关系

rounds.name: Round 3: Deep Analysis
rounds.description: Per-function, extract design decisions with full caller/callee code context
rounds.inputDesc: Target function code + upstream callers code + downstream callees code + business context
rounds.outputDesc: Decision[] — { function, summary, content, keywords, finding_type }

variables.name: callerSection
variables.description: 调用此函数的上游函数代码，可能为空

variables.name: calleeSection
variables.description: 此函数调用的下游函数代码，可能为空

rounds.name: Round 4a: Grouping
rounds.description: Cluster related decisions for relationship analysis
rounds.inputDesc: All decision summaries + CPG call hints between decision functions
rounds.outputDesc: { group: id[], reason }[] — clusters of related decisions

variables.name: cpgSection
variables.description: 代码结构提示（哪些函数互相调用），可能为空

rounds.name: Round 4b: Relationships
rounds.description: Per-group, determine edge types and direction between decisions
rounds.inputDesc: Full content of decisions in one group + group reason
rounds.outputDesc: { from, to, type, reason }[] — relationship edges

variables.name: groupReason
variables.description: 为什么这些决策被分在一组

variables.name: decisionList
variables.description: 组内所有决策的完整内容

rounds.name: Round 4c: Keyword Normalization
rounds.description: Merge synonym keywords across all decisions
rounds.inputDesc: All unique keywords from extracted decisions
